mapper.select: select count(*) from post p where p.status = 1 and p.visibility = 1

select p.id, p.user_uuid as userUuid, u.nickname as nickname, p.title, substring(p.content, 1, 10) as contentPreview, p.created_at as createdAt from post p left join user u on p.user_uuid = u.uuid where p.status = 1 and p.visibility = 1 order by p.created_at desc limit #{offset}, #{size}
